---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability for the snapshot generator
labels: enhancement
---

> **Before filing:** dspack-export is a snapshot generator by design. Drift
> detection, snapshot diffing, watch mode, CI enforcement, and write-back are
> permanently out of scope — that problem space is
> [Aesthetic Function](https://github.com/aestheticfunction/aesthetic-function).
> Format/schema proposals belong in
> [dspack](https://github.com/aestheticfunction/dspack); agent-serving
> proposals in [ds-mcp](https://github.com/aestheticfunction/ds-mcp).
> See [CONTRIBUTING](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#a-note-on-scope-please-read-before-proposing-features).

**The problem you're trying to solve** (not the solution)

**Where it shows up** (your stack, repo layout, workflow)

**Proposed behavior**, if you have one

**Would this change generated output?** If yes, sketch the dspack fields
affected.
